case_title: GREIDY BALAM VS. SF MULTIFAMILY III PROPERTY,LLC ET AL

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF BALAM, GREIDY AS TO DEFENDANT BRICK AND TIMBER

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-23-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-23-2023 BY VISITING JUDGE SYLVIA HUSING. PLAINTIFF GREIDY BALAM IS PRESENT WITH WITNESS ALLISON BALAM. DEFENDANT SF MULTIFAMILY III PROPERTY, LLC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY TIFFANY TRAN, ADMINISTRATOR. DEFENDANT BRICK AND TIMBER IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY TIFFANY TRAN, ADMINISTRATOR. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON BRICK AND TIMBER. DEFENDANT WAIVIES SERVICE ON BRICK AND TIMBER. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: SYLVIA L. HUSING; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED APR-06-2023, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BRICK AND TIMBER

DEFENDANT SF MULIFAMLY III PROPERTY LLC IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT BRICK AND TIMBER IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
